title: Ensure Dashboard totals refresh immediately after bill creation

requirements.summary: Invalidate and refetch the useGetTotals query after bill creation so Dashboard cards update immediately
acceptanceCriteria: Creating a new bill causes the Dashboard's 'units sold today' card to update its value without a manual page refresh.
Creating a new bill causes the Dashboard's 'income today' card to update its value without a manual page refresh.
The React Query cache for useGetTotals is invalidated as part of the createBill mutation's onSuccess callback.
The Dashboard continues to use today's IST date when querying totals.

file_operations.description: Modify the useCreateBill mutation to include an onSuccess callback that invalidates the 'totals' query cache using queryClient.invalidateQueries. This ensures the Dashboard's useGetTotals hook refetches immediately after a bill is successfully created, updating the 'units sold today' and 'income today' cards without requiring a manual page refresh.
